# Planning Refactor Skill (Alias)

This skill is retained for backward compatibility.

Use the canonical planning skill instead:

- Full instructions: `.github/skills/planning-feature/SKILL.md`

## Notes
- Use `planning-feature` for both large feature planning and large refactor planning.
- Keep this alias to avoid breaking older prompts and task files.
